widgets.title: A2UI 0.8 Standard Components Showcase
widgets.description: This surface demonstrates the native rendering capabilities of the A2UI React client harness.

modal_content.title: System Architecture Insights
modal_content.body: The A2UI (Agent-to-Agent User Interface) version 0.8 operates strictly stateless. Tool outputs return pure JSON structures which are translated dynamically by Component Mappers into beautiful client interfaces, decoupling raw execution logic from visual presentation entirely.
